data.settleTest: A country-level total installed IT-load table (colocation + enterprise/self-operated) for the CE-7 set — e.g., BMWK/German Datacenters, CBRE Suisse, and Dutch DCA figures reconciled — showing each country's share of total load versus its colocation-only share. This exists today and would settle whether applying colo weights to the enterprise slice mis-locates enterprise demand.

proposedCorrection.rationale: Switzerland's market is self-operation-heavy (CBRE: 340 MW commercial vs Mordor 850.6 MW total incl. self-operated); the enterprise slice should use installed-base weights (~0.13), not colocation-only (0.08), which understate DACH enterprise rooms.

researchQueries.query: CE-7 country-level total installed data center IT power including self-operated/enterprise rooms 2025 (BMWK Germany 2,700 MW, CBRE Suisse Switzerland, Dutch DCA Netherlands) — reconcile shares of total vs colocation-only
Netherlands enterprise on-premise / self-operated data center IT power outside Amsterdam metro 2024-2025 — does NL total-load share stay near its 0.28 colocation share
